title: Great app for investing
review_text: I have been using Groww for over a year now. The interface is clean and easy to navigate. Mutual fund investments are seamless.

title: Good but KYC is slow
review_text: The app works well overall but the KYC verification took almost 3 days. Would appreciate faster processing.

title: Withdrawal issues
review_text: My withdrawal has been pending for 5 days. Customer support is not responding. Very frustrating experience.

title: Best investment app
review_text: Groww has made investing so simple. I started my SIP journey here and the experience has been fantastic.

title: Statements are confusing
review_text: The portfolio statement is hard to read. I cannot figure out my actual returns vs invested amount easily.

title: App crashes during payment
review_text: Every time I try to add money the app crashes. This has happened 4 times this week. Please fix this bug.

title: Smooth onboarding
review_text: Signed up and completed KYC in under 10 minutes. Very smooth process compared to other apps I have tried.

title: Nice UI but slow sometimes
review_text: The design is really good and intuitive. However the app becomes slow when loading portfolio data on weekdays.

title: KYC rejected without reason
review_text: My KYC was rejected but no clear reason was given. I had to resubmit everything. Needs better communication.

title: Excellent for beginners
review_text: As a first-time investor Groww made everything easy to understand. The educational content is very helpful.

title: Payment gateway issues
review_text: Sometimes payments fail and money gets deducted but the transaction does not go through. Refund takes too long.

title: Good app overall
review_text: Works well for daily use. Would love a dark mode option and better notification controls.

title: Cannot withdraw my money
review_text: I have been trying to withdraw for a week. The button just spins and nothing happens. This is unacceptable.

title: Love the simplicity
review_text: Everything is where you expect it to be. Buying and selling stocks is very straightforward.

title: Onboarding stuck at PAN verification
review_text: The PAN verification step keeps failing even though my details are correct. Stuck for 2 days now.

title: Reliable and fast
review_text: Transactions execute quickly and the app rarely has downtime. Very dependable for daily trading.

title: Clean design
review_text: The app looks great and is easy to use. The home screen gives a good overview of my portfolio.

title: Statement download broken
review_text: The PDF statement download feature does not work on iOS. It just shows a blank page every time.

title: Slow customer support
review_text: Raised a ticket 4 days ago about a failed payment. Still no response. Support needs major improvement.

title: Best mutual fund app
review_text: I have tried several investment apps and Groww is by far the easiest to use for mutual funds.

title: Money stuck after payment failure
review_text: Paid for a mutual fund but the order failed. Money was deducted and has not been refunded after 6 days.

title: Good for long term investing
review_text: Works perfectly for SIPs and long-term investments. The goal-based investing feature is a nice touch.

title: KYC process needs improvement
review_text: The video KYC kept disconnecting. Had to attempt it three times before it finally worked.

title: Highly recommend
review_text: Groww has changed how I think about investing. Simple
source: and reliable. Highly recommend to everyone.

title: Withdrawal takes too long
review_text: Withdrawals should be instant or at most same day. Waiting 3 to 5 business days feels outdated.

title: Mostly great
review_text: The app does what it promises. Minor bugs here and there but nothing that stops me from using it daily.

title: Cannot login after update
review_text: After the latest update I cannot log in. The OTP screen freezes. Please roll back or fix urgently.

title: Perfect for new investors
review_text: The guided onboarding and risk assessment made me feel confident starting my investment journey.

title: Portfolio view needs work
review_text: Would love to see a breakdown of gains by asset class. The current view is too aggregated.

title: Solid app with minor issues
review_text: Overall a solid investment platform. The occasional slowness during market hours is the only complaint.
